# Attr.AllowedClasses.txt 知识梳理

> 来源: `Attr.AllowedClasses.txt` | 字数: 222

## 内容全文

Attr.AllowedClasses

TYPE: lookup/null

VERSION: 4.0.0

DEFAULT: null

--DESCRIPTION--

List of allowed class values in the class attribute. By default, this is null,

which means all classes are allowed.

--# vim: et sw=4 sts=4
